# Copilot Instructions for meshStack Terraform Provider

Development conventions for this repo live in **[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)** at the repository
root — the single source of truth for both AI agents and humans. Read it first.

Deeper, on-demand procedures live as skills under `.agents/skills/` (`.claude/skills` is a symlink
to it). AGENTS.md's "Where things live" section is the canonical index — consult it there rather
than maintaining a second copy here, which only drifts. The contributor how-to is
[`DEVELOPMENT.md`](../DEVELOPMENT.md).
